name: merge_dedup preserves runtime type identity (number vs string)
description: Locks Go's `map[any]struct{}` semantics: dedup keys with different runtime types (e.g. number 1 vs string "1") must NOT collapse. pine-cpp originally stringified all keys via sprint_value so 1 and "1" both produced "1" and merged incorrectly. Reference: P0-3 in `.llmdoc-tmp/cpp-runtime-parity-audit/04-operators.md`.

cases.name: number 1 and string "1" are distinct keys
